location: Academy of Raya Lucaria — inside a chest atop the bell tower, reached via a long rooftop platforming route starting from the Debate Parlor

source.name: Bell tower chest, Raya Lucaria Academy rooftops

tactics: From Debate Parlor grace, go north into the courtyard, through the northwest door past a sorcerer, then out onto the rooftops
Follow the roofs south, climb a ladder, then make a long running jump west across a wide gap — a missed jump is a fatal fall
Marionette Soldiers patrol some rooftop stretches and can knock you off with spear thrusts, approach the edges carefully
The bell tower interior has enemies clinging to the walls, clear them before the long ladder climb up to the chest
lore: An exquisitely crafted ceremonial crossbow commissioned to celebrate the marriage — and reconciliation — between the houses of the Erdtree and the Full Moon, Leyndell and Raya Lucaria; its twin rings visibly spin as it's reloaded.

builds.name: Caster's ranged backup
builds.why: Deals innate magic damage alongside physical and asks for Intelligence, giving INT-focused casters a no-investment ranged poke to fall back on between spells
